scripts.build: echo 'nothing to build for this package itself — @cron/worker and @cron/router build via turbo ^build, from the workspace deps below'
scripts.deploy: pnpm turbo run build --filter @prisma/example-cron... && ( set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-app deploy system.ts ${CRON_STACK_NAME:+--name "$CRON_STACK_NAME"} )
scripts.destroy: ( set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-app destroy system.ts ${CRON_STACK_NAME:+--name "$CRON_STACK_NAME"} )
